title: Nordenstamia tuestae
taxonomy: Nordenstamia tuestae is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Ecuador. The plant belongs to the genus Nordenstamia. The classification of Nordenstamia tuestae includes it being in the family Asteraceae, order Asterales, and class Magnoliopsida. Further classification information is available in botanical databases and academic sources.

intro: Nordenstamia tuestae is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and digestive problems, thanks to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Nordenstamia tuestae include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Nordenstamia tuestae is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used to make topical creams and ointments to alleviate skin conditions and wounds.
